supersession_note: Supersedes the PENDING 2026-06-05 proposal (28.4 -> 22.8, -5.6, remained Developing). The 06-06/06-08 evidence is MATERIALLY larger: (1) the Chamber of Deputies passed (June 7) and President Paz SIGNED (June 8) a law authorizing the military to use force against protesters with a 'presumption-of-legality' shield (a CODIFIED impunity structure -- a state-conduct change beyond the 06-05 attested deaths/detentions, directly degrading AB1/AB2/I4); (2) casualty/detention toll escalated to 10 killed / 365+ arrested with La Paz and El Alto near-fully blockaded; (3) terrorism charges against 25 union leaders incl. COB chief Mario Argullo. This justifies a DEEPER revision and a band crossing into Critical, so the 06-05 proposal is withdrawn in favor of this one.
key_evidence: President Paz signed a law (June 8, 2026) authorizing the military to use force against protesters and granting soldiers a 'presumption of legality' -- a CODIFIED impunity shield deeming their actions lawful unless proven otherwise (Al Jazeera; the-messenger.com; JURIST). This is a structural state-conduct change distinct from the 06-05 attested casualties, degrading AB1 harm-acknowledgment, AB2 correction-willingness, and I4 values-alignment toward the lower anchors.

Independent public-ombudsman report: 10 killed, 37 injured, 365 arrested (May 1 - June 2); government attributes 7 deaths to lack of medical attention amid blockades -- state-attributable access harm (ACT). Further arrests after the signing (28 in El Alto, 23 in Cochabamba with tear gas) (Al Jazeera; ABC News).

Terrorism charges filed against 25 union leaders including COB executive secretary Mario Argullo -- criminalization of labor leadership / weaponization of the justice apparatus (EQU, BND, INT). La Paz and El Alto near-fully blockaded; cities isolated amid the worst economic crisis in four decades; Defense and Education ministers resigned June 2 (apparatus stressed).
methodology_ruling: STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX -> CODIFIED-IMPUNITY-ESCALATION (SCORABLE, BAND-CROSSING). The 06-05 proposal priced attested lethal force + mass detention as un-priced harm on a non-floor Developing entity (-5.6, remained Developing). The 06-06/06-08 evidence adds a CODIFIED impunity structure (presumption-of-legality military-force law) plus a higher toll and city blockades. The signed-into-law impunity shield is a durable state-conduct change (not merely incident-level harm), pulling ACC to 1.3 and INT to 1.5 and crossing the entity into Critical. The toll (10 killed/365 arrested) is now directly attested, not modeled. Magnitude rests on the signed law + attested deaths/detentions, NOT on charge outcomes (charges remain filed-not-adjudicated), hence medium-high rather than high confidence.
